data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: End-to-end encryption is in place for data in transmission to protect user privacy.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 for data in transit, encrypted data storage.

data.title: User Authentication
data.description: Two-factor authentication is available to enhance user account security.
data.technical_spec: Two-factor authentication via SMS or authenticator apps.

data.title: Threat Detection
data.description: Real-time monitoring systems for detecting unusual activity and potential threats.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning anomaly detection, log analysis.

data.title: Access Controls
data.description: Role-based access controls are in place to manage employee and system access.

data.title: Incident Response
data.description: Established protocols for responding to security incidents.
